name: Cholent Brisket
recipeIngredient: Several small pieces of marrow bone
1 cup Dry limas, soaked in water overnight and then boiled
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the onions in the fat until golden.
2. Season the meat with salt and pepper, then brown on all sides in the fat.
3. Transfer the meat and onions to a 4-quart casserole with a tight lid.
4. Arrange the marrow bones around the meat.
5. Place the potatoes and soaked limas around the meat.
6. Add boiling water to cover; using some of the water the limas were soaked in, ensure everything is covered.
7. Season with additional salt and pepper if needed. Optionally, add a bit of garlic and ginger.
8. Cover tightly and bake overnight at a low oven temperature (250-275°F) or cook on top of the stove for 3-4 hours, simmering gently.
